title: The Turning Wind
writer: Luiz Paulino Dos Santos, Glauber Rocha, Jose Teles
actors: Antonio Pitanga, Luiza Maranhão, Lucy de Carvalho
plot: In the State of Bahia, Brazil, an educated black man returns to his home fishing village to try and free people from mysticism, in particular the Candomblé religion, which he considers a factor of political and social oppression.
